lines.english: Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House, Partaal:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Love of the enticing Beloved Lord is the most glorious love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਏਕੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋ ਲੇਖੈ ਸੰਤ ਲਾਗੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਛਾਡੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਕੀ ਕੁਰੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap man gobind ekai avar nahee ko lekhai sant laag maneh chhaadd dubidhaa kee kureea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditate, O mind, on the One Lord of the Universe - nothing else is of any account. Attach your mind to the Saints, and abandon the path of duality. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਹਰੀਆ ਸਰਗੁਨ ਧਰੀਆ ਅਨਿਕ ਕੋਠਰੀਆ ਭਿੰਨ ਭਿੰਨ ਭਿੰਨ ਭਿਨ ਕਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: niragun hareea saragun dhareea anik kotthareea bhin bhin bhin bhin kareea |
lines.english: The Lord is absolute and unmanifest; He has assumed the most sublime manifestation. He has fashioned countless body chambers of many, varied, different, myriad forms.
Within them, the mind is the policeman;
my Beloved lives in the temple of my inner self.
He plays there in ecstasy.
He does not die, and he never grows old. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤਨਿ ਜੁਰੀਆ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਫਿਰੀਆ ਪਰ ਕਉ ਹਿਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kiratan jureea bahu bidh fireea par kau hireea |
lines.english: He is engrossed in worldly activities, wandering around in various ways. He steals the property of others,
and is surrounded by corruption and sin.
But now, he joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy,
He obtains the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.
and stands before the Lord's Gate.
Nanak has met the Guru;
The Lord has made this world a stage;
He fashioned the expanse of the entire creation. ||1||Pause||
he shall not be reincarnated again. ||2||1||44||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
He fashioned it in various ways, with limitless colors and forms.
He enjoys all the delights, and yet He remains unattached. ||1||
He watches over it with joy, and He never tires of enjoying it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨੁ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੁਖੁ ਨ ਮਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: baran chihan naahee mukh na maasaaraa |
lines.english: He has no color, no sign, no mouth and no beard.
I cannot describe Your play.
Nanak is the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||2||2||45||
I have come to You. I have come to Your Sanctuary.
I have come to place my faith in You. I have come seeking Mercy.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਗੁਰਹਿ ਪਠਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakhahu suaamee maarag gureh patthaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If it pleases You, save me, O my Lord and Master. The Guru has placed me upon the Path. ||1||Pause||
Maya is very treacherous and difficult to pass through.
I am so afraid to hear
that the Righteous Judge of Dharma is so strict and stern. ||2||
It is like a violent wind-storm. ||1||
I have grasped the Support of the Holy Saints.
Nanak meditates on the Lord.
it is all on fire. ||3||
The world is a deep, dark pit;
Now, I have found the Perfect Lord. ||4||3||46||
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਠਾ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਤਾਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tutthaa sachaa paatisaahu taap geaa sansaaraa |1|
lines.english: When the True King is pleased, the world is rid of its diseases. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ਬੇਨੰਤੀਆ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur paas benanteea milai naam aadhaaraa |
lines.english: I offer this prayer to the True Guru, to bless me with the sustenance of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਤੂੰ ਸੰਤਾ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kee ttek toon santaa kee ott toon sachaa sirajanahaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are the Support of Your devotees, and the Shelter of the Saints, O True Creator Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਾਮਗਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਰਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach teree saamagaree sach teraa darabaaraa |
lines.english: True are Your devices, and True is Your Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਤੇਰਿਆ ਸੇਵਕਾ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hau kurabaanee teriaa sevakaa jina har naam piaaraa |3|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to Your servants; they love Your Name, O Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਅਨੂਪੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: teraa roop agam hai anoop teraa darasaaraa |
lines.english: Your Form is inaccessible, and Your Vision is incomparably beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਖਾਜੀਨਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sach tere khaajeeniaa sach teraa paasaaraa |2|
lines.english: True are Your treasures, and True is Your expanse. ||2||
